title: Movie Quotes — object-array format
description: Raw format used by NikhilNamal17/popular-movie-quotes (https://github.com/NikhilNamal17/popular-movie-quotes, MIT). A flat JSON array of objects. The field contract is derived from the package's own test suite (test/test.js): quote (string), movie (string), type (string), year (number). This schema was authored by DutchJaFO/Quotinator and may be proposed upstream.

year.description: Release year of the source work.
